text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. This is the closest I've ever gotten to
you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the breeze left in your wake now... Just
barely, but... much more than before...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And I think... I know who I have to thank for
that...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I... We are going to train even harder.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So wait for me there... across the gloom...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Because I'm going to catch up to you. I know it.
